home.tagline.message: 12 reusable systems that remove repetitive Unity game-development work. Each system can be used as an independent instance.

home.meta.desc.message: 12 reusable systems for Unity game development.

home.feature.tutorial.desc.message: ScriptableObject-based tutorials with button highlighting, waits, dialogue, skip support, and saved completion state.

home.feature.conditionGraph.desc.message: Define complex game conditions as AND / OR / NOT data trees for shops, events, achievements, and UI gates.

home.feature.statModifier.desc.message: Calculate final stat values with Flat, PercentAdd, and PercentMultiply modifiers managed by source.

home.feature.formula.desc.message: Store balance formulas in assets so designers can edit expressions like Attack * SkillMultiplier - Defense.

home.feature.curveData.desc.message: Use AnimationCurve assets for level-based HP, EXP, rewards, and other balance tables.

home.feature.sequence.desc.message: Build presentation flows with Move, Wait, Fade, Scale, Sound, and Callback steps instead of nested coroutines.

home.feature.cameraDirector.desc.message: Chain Zoom, Shake, Move, and Wait camera actions around gameplay events.

home.feature.buffDebuff.desc.message: Manage duration, stacks, ticks, and custom effects through ScriptableObject definitions.

home.feature.quest.desc.message: Compose Kill, Talk, and Collect steps into event-driven quest pipelines.

home.feature.spawn.desc.message: Configure weighted random spawns, alive limits, intervals, and radii with SpawnGroup assets.

home.feature.actionReplay.desc.message: Record input frames with timestamps and replay them at different speeds for ghosts, QA, or highlights.

home.feature.timeRewind.desc.message: Capture snapshots from any IRewindable object and restore the world to a previous point in time.
